description: Metadata-only Safetensors header gate now PASSES all requirements against the pinned immutable artifact: format-hardened parser + provenance-bound ranged fetcher (HTTP 206 + Content-Range verified, immutable per-shard OID bound, resolve URL pinned to the 40-hex commit) + index<->header reconciliation. This is a Phase-0 SUB-GATE pass only; overall artifact admission remains blocked pending the composition gates. Aggregate-only: counts, booleans, public architecture shapes; no tensor names, URLs, OIDs, response headers, caches, or local paths.

header_gate_requirements_satisfied.format: shape/dtype bound to exact byte span (frozen dtype table); complete hole-free coverage; duplicate keys rejected; Safetensors grammar enforced; booleans rejected
header_gate_requirements_satisfied.range_provenance: every ranged read asserted HTTP 206 + exact Content-Range start/end/total; non-206 / wrong Content-Range / unpinned (mutable) resolve URL fail closed
header_gate_requirements_satisfied.immutable_identity: all 14 shards bound to an immutable LFS sha256 OID before header bytes were read
header_gate_requirements_satisfied.reconciliation: each indexed tensor appears once in its declared shard; no unindexed tensor; every shard covered; no extra shard
header_gate_requirements_satisfied.no_payload: only header ranges (bytes 0-7 then 8..7+n) fetched; no tensor payload ranges; no full shard cached

other_open_phase0_gates: packed(source)<->numbered(artifact) expert representation map + source<->index module-set equality
one production-path final conjunction with self-binding/provenance failure tests
weight staging (still prohibited before a genuine overall pass)
privacy: aggregate-only; no tensor names, URLs, OIDs, response headers, weights, caches, or local paths
